query_text: Plan a 3-day trip for 2 people from Spokane to Boise from November 23rd to November 25th, 2024, with a budget of $1,500. Include visits to attractions such as Nature & Parks and Sights & Landmarks.

properties.description: Freak Alley Gallery is the largest outdoor mural gallery in the Northwest. It's free and open to the public 24/7. We also have an Indoor Gallery that promotes our local Art and Artists; all proceeds from sales support the project and keep the lights on. Be sure to visit our website for detailed information on the indoor and outdoor events. You can even watch the progression of this Boise landmark.

properties.localAddress: 981 W Grove St, Inside the Hotel 43, 83702-7036
properties.name: Chandlers Prime Steaks & Fine Seafood
properties.description: Located in the Hotel 43 in downtown Boise, Chandlers is a locally-owned, upscale dinner house specializing in prime steaks, jet-fresh seafood and premium craft cocktails. A three-course prix-fixe dinner option rounds out our extensive menu. Chandlers is the recipient of the DiRona award which recognizes distinguished restaurants of North America and is Boise’s only Forbes Travel Guide Recommended restaurant! The wine list features over 700 selections, two dozen wines-by-the-glass, and we have been recognized by Wine Spectator for our wine list every year since opening in 1999, earning the Best Award of Excellence since 2014. There’s live jazz music seven nights a week from a variety of amazing local performers. We look forward to "meating" you!

properties.name: Fork
properties.description: Fork offers cuisine inspired from the Northwest region using the finest and freshest locally sourced ingredients. Fork also offers hand-crafted cocktails, a large selection of regional wines and beers in a rustic yet very warm, welcoming setting. Fork is open for lunch and dinner daily and Saturday & Sunday brunch, local ingredients sourced from the Capital City Public Market on Saturday mornings.

properties.rankingString: #9 of 699 Restaurants in Boise
properties.name: Bardenay Restaurant & Distillery
properties.description: Established in 1999. With three locations in Boise, Eagle and Coeur d'Alene that capture the spirit of Idaho and the Northwest, Bardenay Restaurant and Distillery is a cornerstone of Idaho's restaurant and bar industry. The original establishment is located in a once empty warehouse on the Historic Basque Block in downtown Boise, Idaho. On April 25th, 2000, history was made when we served the first cocktail to included spirits distilled in a restaurant in the US. As the nation's first restaurant distillery, Bardenay has set an industry precedent as the first full service restaurant and bar with the ability to create handcrafted liquor on-site. Our distillers are happy to give tours as time allows. Please ask your server if you are interested in a closer look at our operations. p.s. We are only allowed to sell our fine spirits by the drink. If you would like to purchase a bottle, you may do so at many of our state liquor stores.

properties.rankingString: #4 of 699 Restaurants in Boise
properties.name: Goldy's Breakfast Bistro
properties.description: Goldy's Breakfast Bistro ("Goldy's") was opened in February 1999 in the heart of downtown Boise, ID. Goldy's takes pride in its made to order breakfast using as many fresh local ingredients as possible to provide a variety of choices. Choose from our standard combo meals that give you choices, choices, choices. We are known for our homemade Hollandaise and our unique entrees Spinach Frittata, Andalusia Eggs (Bon Appetite's favorite (2002 Issue)) and always our scratch pancakes. Bragging rights include: - Idaho Statesman Top Dog Treasure Valley for Best Breakfast (July10, 2009 and July 11, 2009) - Idaho Statesman Top Dog Treasure Valley for Best Brunch (July 10, 2009 and July 11, 2008) - Boise Weekly: Best of Boise (September 2000-September 2009) - Bon Appetite Magazine: One of Americas Top Ten Breakfasts.We will call you when your table is ready. Randy & Wanda Martinat

properties.name: Sandbar Patio Bar & Grill
properties.description: Closed for the season. We look forward to welcoming you back in 2025! The Sandbar offers locally sourced, fresh, grilled cuisine and a full-service bar with specialty cocktails and the area’s best selection of local draft beer. Enjoy live music on the Sandbar stage every evening. Please note that business hours following Labor Day will be 11am until 9pm. All hours are weather permitting.
